name: P90 | 精英之作
descriptionEn: Easily recognizable for its unique bullpup design, the P90 is a great weapon to shoot on the move due to its high-capacity magazine and low recoil. It has been custom painted using a combination of hydrographics and careful stenciling and detailed with heat-transfer decals. Tread softly Naomi...people in your line of work aren't known for their longevity - The Shield and The Serpent Part 2
descriptionZh: 因其独特的无托设计而更加容易辨认，多亏了 P90 高容量的弹匣和低后坐力，这把武器非常适合边移动边射击。 这把武器将花纹和严谨的漏印结合起来，通过热转印贴花加强细节，然后进行了自定义涂装。 小心翼翼的娜奥米啊…… 和你干同一个行当的人可不是以长命著称的呢 -《盾与蛇（下）》
